title: Union Pacific Stock Has More Room For Growth
text: Despite an 11% rise over the last six months, at the current price of around $245 per share, we believe Union Pacific stock (NYSE: UNP) has more to go. UNP stock has rallied from $220 to $245 since late August 2021, outperforming the broader indices, with the S&P falling 6% over the same period.

title: Union Pacific Corporation Executives to Address the Barclays 2022 Industrial Select Conference
text: OMAHA, Neb., Feb. 16, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Lance Fritz, chairman, president, and chief executive officer, and Jennifer Hamann, executive vice president and chief financial officer, of Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) will address the Barclays 2022 Industrial Select Conference on Wednesday, February 23, 2022, at 8:00 a.m.

title: How Are Industrial ETFs Reacting to Mixed Q4 Earnings?
text: The industrial sector is expected to rebound from the coronavirus-led slump as the U.S. economy is expected to keep recovering in the rest of 2022.

title: Union Pacific Releases First 'We Are One' Human Capital Report
text: OMAHA, Neb., Feb. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific Railroad made strong strides in 2021 toward its goal of creating a more diverse and inclusive workforce and providing a world-class employee experience.

title: Union Pacific's (UNP) Buyback Plan to Grow Shareholders' Wealth
text: The new buyback program reflects Union Pacific's (UNP) shareholder-friendly attitude.

title: Union Pacific Elects Teresa Finley to Board of Directors
text: OMAHA, Neb., Feb. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific Corporation today announced Teresa Finley has been elected to the company's board of directors, effective Feb. 4.

title: Union Pacific Corporation Declares First Quarter 2022 Dividend and Announces New Share Repurchase Authorization
text: OMAHA, Neb., Feb. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.18 per share on the company's common stock, payable March 31, 2022, to shareholders of record February 28, 2022.

title: Union Pacific Board of Directors Appoints Beth Whited to New Sustainability and Strategy Position
text: OMAHA, Neb., Feb. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific today announced Beth Whited was appointed executive vice president – Sustainability and Strategy by the Board of Directors, effective immediately.

title: Cramer's Investing Club: We're exiting Union Pacific, considering better risk/reward stocks
text: We believe our capital can work harder for us elsewhere and would be adding to another Club position if not restricted.

title: Union Pacific Named One of the World's Most Admired Companies
text: OMAHA, Neb., Feb. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific Railroad has again been named to Fortune magazine's World's Most Admired Companies list and is the highest ranked railroad in the Trucking, Transportation and Logistics category.

title: How Union Pacific Is Overcoming Supply Chain Challenges
text: The railroad delivered strong results in a difficult environment.

title: TuSimple To Haul Freight For Union Pacific In ‘Driver Out' Robot Trucks
text: The freight rail giant will be the first customer to use TuSimple's automated trucking network between Tucson and Phoenix, Arizona.

title: Union Pacific Corporation CFO Jennifer Hamann to Address the Stifel 2022 Transportation and Logistics Conference
text: OMAHA, Neb., Feb. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jennifer Hamann, executive vice president and chief financial officer, of Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) will address the Stifel 2022 Transportation and Logistics Conference at 10:40 a.m.
